candidate_llm_application: CHASQUI-RELAY: fixed-segment memoryless multi-agent cascade with compressed-string quipu summary + verification-repetition handoff

independent_scores.reason: Anthropic specialised subagents with summary-based handoff is a near-direct functional twin of CHASQUI-RELAY's specialised per-segment agents + compressed summary handoff.
Context isolation via sub-agents + staged compaction = memoryless + compressed-summary handoff.
Verification-first counterexample-driven repair covers CHASQUI-RELAY's verification-repetition mechanism.
Handoff deviation metric + structured tracing of parent-child handoffs maps to verification-repetition + segment specialisation.
Explicit handoff contracts + structured topology = fixed-segment + memoryless handoff with verification.
Comprehensive memory mechanism survey covers handoff + summarisation patterns including memoryless variants.
Dynamic shared contexts for continual multi-LLM guidance covers segment-to-segment summary handoff.
Pipeline-stage token-efficiency optimisation covers compressed-summary handoff + fixed-segment specialisation.

rationale: 8 of 8 results cross all three hit criteria (kw>=2, sem>=0.7, func>=0.7). Anthropic multi-agent research system and Google Developers handoff-contract framework are direct functional twins for specialised-agent + summary-handoff + verification structure. TraceFix covers verification-repetition; context-isolation/staged-compaction papers cover memoryless+compressed-summary. The recombination memoryless+verification-repetition+fixed-segment does not introduce a sufficiently novel mechanism beyond existing multi-agent orchestration literature. Total >= 1 ⇒ FAIL.
